title: Laser Tag
description: Extremely simple laser tag plugin made for a small group of people
body:
### ALERT
This plugin will no longer be updated as it has been made into a private, full-scale plugin for a public minigame server. Learn more [here](https://charged.venox.network).

That said, the source code and issue tracker will no longer be available.

## Laser Tag
Straightforward Minecraft laser tag plugin. *Made for [Meizono](https://solo.to/meizono).*

### Commands
- `/lasertag <blue|red> <add|remove> <player>` - Adds/removes a player from a team
- `/lasertag <start>` - Starts the game (this will clear all participants' inventories)

### Disclaimer
I made this in a day so it might not be perfect. Unfortunately, I won't be fixing/maintaining this plugin anymore due to the abovementioned full-scale event.

[![Lilypad server hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bddbb9240f68113aef1720fbea033be56d983dd2_0.webp)](https://srnyx.com/lilypad)
[![Review me on TrustPilot!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f19c1b92a2bee97bcd69c135cdc2520028cbc649.png)](https://srnyx.com/review)
